CustomField.description: Indicates whether the Project Code Name will appear on the FCC Pay Advice. If 'Yes,' the Pay Advice will display the Pay Code along with the Timesheet Activity/Project. If 'No,' only the Pay Code Name will be shown.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates whether the Project Code Name will appear on the FCC Pay Advice. If 'Yes,' the Pay Advice will display the Pay Code along with the Timesheet Activity/Project. If 'No,' only the Pay Code Name will be shown.
CustomField.label: Display on Pay Advice
